name: codex-weixin-notifier
description: Send Weixin notifications and accept Weixin commands for Codex tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Notify Weixin and route Weixin task commands.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local Weixin/iLink workflow for Codex notifications plus Weixin-driven task start, working-directory confirmation, task/process listing, and follow-up instruction routing.
defaultPrompt: Help me configure Weixin completion notifications.
Send a test Codex completion notification.
Start the Weixin command router for Codex tasks.
